ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instance_types" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance type */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of the instance (e.g., M3.Medium, M4.Large) */,
  "vcpu_count" INTEGER /* Number of virtual CPUs (vCPUs) in the instance */,
  "ram_gib" REAL /* Amount of RAM in GiB */,
  "storage_ssd" TEXT /* Storage configuration (e.g., 1 x 4 GB, EBS-only) */,
  "price_per_hour" REAL /* Price per hour for the instance */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the instance is available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance type */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Supported operating system for the instance */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the instance */,
  "zones" TEXT /* List of availability zones where the instance is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_types_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US-East-1, EU-West-2) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., Virginia, Ireland) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the data center within the region */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the data center */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data center is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the customer belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the customer (e.g., admin, user, developer) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instance_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance usage event */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance being used */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer using the instance */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the instance usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the instance usage */,
  "total_hours" REAL /* Total hours the instance was used */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the instance usage */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "instance_status" TEXT /* Status of the instance */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_usage_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instance_types ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instance_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance event */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., start, stop, terminate) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_events_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instance_types ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being billed */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the billing record */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used by the customer */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing record */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_billing_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_id") REFERENCES billing ("billing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
